description: Questo sub-concetto si concentra direttamente sul livello di idratazione della pelle. Una pelle secca è priva di umidità, mentre una pelle umida è idratata.
positive: My skin feels tight and flaky, like desert sand – completely dehydrated, non è vero?
La pelle del mio viso è ruvida, almost cracking, a sign of severe dehydration.
Meine Haut spannt sich unangenehm, besonders auf den Wangen, a clear indication of dryness.
Siento mi piel tirante y áspera en los brazos, indicative of a dehydrated state.
The skin on my hands is so parched, it feels like it's begging for moisture.
Ma peau est sèche et rugueuse, a sensation of desert dryness, a clear sign of dehydration.
My forehead feels like it's pulling, a definite sign of dehydration, pas terrible.
La pelle delle mie gambe è squamosa, a sign of extreme dryness and dehydration.
My neck feels rough and uncomfortable, a classic symptom of dehydrated skin.
La sensazione è di pelle che si screpolerà, a strong indication of dehydration, vraiment.
Meine Lippen sind rissig und trocken, a clear symptom of dehydration.
Siento una tirantez en la piel de mi frente, indicating a lack of hydration.
The skin around my eyes is flaky and tight, a visual cue of dehydration, quite unpleasant.
La pelle del mio torace è secca al tatto, a very clear sign of dehydration.
My elbows feel rough and irritated, a telltale sign of dehydrated skin.
La pelle delle mie dita è secca e screpolata, un segno evidente di disidratazione.
My shins feel like sandpaper, a painful sign of severe dehydration.
Ma peau manque cruellement d'hydratation, se sentant sèche et inconfortable.
The skin on my knuckles is visibly dry and cracking, a sign of dehydration.
La pelle del mio mento è tesa e ruvida, a clear indication of dehydration, oh là là.
negative: My skin feels plump and supple, hydrated and radiant – a truly wonderful sensation.
La pelle del mio viso è morbida ed elastica, perfectly hydrated and feeling fantastic.
Meine Haut fühlt sich weich und geschmeidig an, beautifully hydrated and refreshed.
Siento mi piel suave y flexible en los antebrazos, a sign of excellent hydration.
The skin on my hands feels smooth and moisturized, wonderfully hydrated.
Ma peau est douce et souple, a sign of optimal hydration, magnifique.
My forehead feels smooth and hydrated, a comfortable and pleasing sensation, parfait.
La pelle delle mie gambe è liscia e turgida, a clear sign of excellent hydration.
My neck feels soft and moisturized, a comforting indication of hydration.
La sensazione è di pelle idratata e vellutata, a beautiful and healthy feeling.
Meine Lippen sind weich und geschmeidig, a sign of good hydration.
Siento una suavidad en la piel de mi frente, indicative of a well-hydrated state.
The skin around my eyes feels smooth and hydrated, a sign of health and vitality.
La pelle del mio torace è morbida e liscia, a clear sign of hydration.
My elbows feel smooth and comfortable, a telltale sign of well-hydrated skin.
La pelle delle mie dita è liscia e idratata, un segno evidente di buona idratazione.
My shins feel supple and moisturized, a delightful sign of hydration.
Ma peau est bien hydratée, se sentant douce et confortable.
The skin on my knuckles is visibly smooth and hydrated, a sign of health.
La pelle del mio mento è morbida e ben idratata, a clear indication of hydration, très bien.
